merged_intake.purpose: Manual intake template. Fill only after official terms/path/source verification.

datasets.future_stage_after_validator_passes: guarded source conversion + no-leakage + source-CV evaluation

prefill_suggestion.suggested_source_identity: UCY local candidate at external_data/OpenTraj/datasets/UCY; user must confirm it corresponds to official source https://graphics.cs.ucy.ac.cy/research/downloads/crowd-data.
prefill_suggestion.safe_copy_instruction: Copy suggested_local_path/source_identity only after checking official terms; do not set terms_accepted_by_user unless the user has accepted/verified terms.

calibration_prefill.safe_use: Use only after legal terms/source identity confirmation and source-specific calibration validation; not a global metric/seconds claim.

conversion_capability_prefill.safe_use: Use only after user-confirmed official terms/source identity and validator/guarded queue pass; this is not permission and not conversion readiness.

rules: prefill_suggestion is a convenience hint only
user_confirmation remains the only place for accepted terms/path/source identity
blank or suggested-only rows must remain blocked by the validator
calibration hints do not permit conversion or metric/seconds claims
source-specific no-leakage and calibration validation remain required
conversion_capability_prefill is a dry-run capability hint only
it does not grant legal permission or conversion readiness
source-CV plans may only execute after user confirmation, validator pass, guarded queue, and no-leakage checks
